extraction_reasoning: No litigation summary table is disclosed in the provided risk section, so there are no against-vs-by rows to count; criminal, statutory/regulatory enforcement, and tax proceedings are therefore all not disclosed, and no quantified aggregate amount against the company or subsidiaries is available. No contingent-liabilities table or stated total is provided, so the contingent-liabilities figure and date are not disclosed. The company-wide concentration disclosed for the most recent full fiscal year, Fiscal 2021, is revenue from sale of goods to the top 10 distributors of 37.33% of total income from sale of goods; this is treated as the company-wide top-10 customer figure, while no top-five figure is given. The source unit for litigation and contingent-liability monetary tables is not stated because those tables are absent; the other monetary disclosures use ₹ million and ₹ crores, but no litigation or contingent-liability conversion is applicable.
